executionArgs.additionalInstruction: This is an Arabic RTL-first SPA. The admin login is triggered by pressing Alt+A then Alt+T (keyboard shortcut) which opens a passcode modal — there is NO visible login button for admin on page load. The passcode is: DecM7md2019@!. The app requires File System Access API (Chromium only). After login, navigation is tab-based via the sidebar. All UI text is in Arabic. The workspace folder picker appears before the main app — for testing purposes focus on auth and UI interactions that do not require a real workspace folder to be selected.
